corpora.A_radiation: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("radiation risk"[tiab] OR "radiation-induced cancer"[tiab] OR "radiation induced cancer"[tiab] OR "lifetime attributable risk"[tiab] OR "carcinogenic risk"[tiab])
corpora.B_nonscanning: (("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab]) AND ("delayed diagnosis"[tiab] OR "diagnostic delay"[tiab] OR "missed diagnosis"[tiab])) OR ("time to CT"[tiab] OR "door-to-CT"[tiab] OR "door to CT"[tiab] OR "time to computed tomography"[tiab] OR "delayed CT scan"[tiab])
